escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war with confirmed US scatterable mine deployment in Iranian villages and Iranian control over Strait of Hormuz threatening global energy supplies.

ticker_items: US deploys scatterable mines in Iranian village near Shiraz, civilians killed
Iran controls Strait of Hormuz, threatens Bab al-Mandab shipping chokepoint
Russia launches 400-drone spring offensive against Ukrainian civilians
Rubio says US expects Iran war to end in weeks not months
Global fuel shortages reported in multiple regions amid energy crisis

new_entrant.text: Ukraine reportedly sent 201 drone specialists to support US-Israeli operations against Iran.

eastern_europe.description: Russia fired nearly 400 drones plus 23 cruise missiles and 7 ballistic missiles at Ukrainian targets.
Ukraine launched hundreds of drones targeting Russian ports.
Russia launched nearly 400 drones plus 23 cruise missiles and 7 ballistic missiles targeting civilian areas.
Ukrainian drone strike damaged Russian Project 23550 patrol ship Purga under construction.
Russia fired nearly 400 drones plus 23 cruise missiles and 7 ballistic missiles in spring offensive launch
Ukrainian drone strike damaged Russian Project 23550 Arctic patrol ship Purga under construction

middle_east.description: US deployed Gator Scatterable Mine system over Iranian village, killing several people.
Israel announced strikes on Isfahan as part of ongoing campaign.
Israel continues strikes in Lebanon while announcing expanded buffer zone occupation.
US appears to have deployed Gator Scatterable Mine system over Iranian village.
US deployed Gator Scatterable Mine system over Iranian village, several civilians killed
IDF 162nd Division joined expanded ground operations against Hezbollah targets

today.incident: Iran attacks on Shiraz and Abu Dhabi
US scatterable mines in Iranian village

russia.text: Moscow is hearing speculation about preparations for a ground operation on Iran's island of Kharg but hopes it will be limited to words and threats
russia.speaker: Maria Zakharova
russia.title: Russian Foreign Ministry spokesperson

ukraine.text: The United States linked future security guarantees to Kyiv's withdrawal from the Donbas region
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: President Donald Trump is ready to 'unleash hell' on Iran if it remains defiant
middle_east.speaker: White House official
middle_east.title: White House spokesperson

middle_east.text: Iran has responded negatively to an American proposal aimed at ending the ongoing imposed war, insisting that it will only occur on Tehran's own terms and timeline
middle_east.speaker: Senior political-security official
middle_east.title: Iranian official

middle_east.text: Negotiating with Israel under fire would amount to 'surrender' for Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Naim Qassem
middle_east.title: Hezbollah chief

middle_east.text: The military is stretched to the limit and beyond
middle_east.speaker: Yair Lapid
middle_east.title: Israeli opposition leader

middle_east.text: Get serious soon or it won't be pretty
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The Iranian negotiators are very different and strange. They are begging us to make a deal, which they should be doing since they have been militarily obliterated, with zero chance of a comeback
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The US expects its military operation in Iran to conclude in weeks, not months
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

observers.description: UK announces intention to interdict Russian shadow fleet vessels in British waters. Military will be authorized to board and inspect ships as part of escalating pressure campaign against Moscow.
Defense Minister Boris Pistorius states Germany will only help secure Strait of Hormuz after ceasefire deal is struck. Position reflects European reluctance to escalate Middle East involvement.
Reports indicate some ships are paying Chinese yuan to transit Strait of Hormuz under Iranian toll booth regime. China appears to be working within Iranian-controlled shipping framework.
Kim Jong Un holds talks with Belarus President Lukashenko in Pyongyang, signing friendship treaty. Meeting strengthens anti-Western axis amid global conflicts.

Pakistan confirmed facilitating indirect negotiations between US and Iran. Diplomatic efforts are accelerating with proposals being exchanged through Pakistani channels despite Iranian denials of direct talks.
Ukraine announced a 'mutually beneficial' defense deal with Saudi Arabia. The pact involves sharing Ukrainian expertise on countering drones amid the Iran war.
Trump singled out Australia as unwilling to help secure Strait of Hormuz amid Iran war. Australian government appears reluctant to commit forces to US-led operation despite alliance obligations.

financial.notes: Global energy crisis threatens Ukraine war effort with soaring fuel costs while Strait of Hormuz disruptions spike oil prices globally.
